title: Babyfication [More Baby Mobs]
description:
This data pack will add more baby mobs to your world than there are in vanilla Minecraft!
All babies are balanced and fit in vanilla
body:
**Hey there! Just want to let you know, disabling your adblocker supports the creators like me on Modrinth! Plus, Modrinth's ads are not that intrusive. They are text-only, small, and use an in-house ad network. If you would, please disable your adblocker so you can support me in future endevours!** ![Babyfication Title](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/vhO6iWCb/images/a310ef18588c893430e7f927f5b4fdfcbc17a0da.png 'Babyfication') # Datapack for Minecraft: Java Edition **Babyfication** is a datapack that changes the spawn of mobs, the purpose of which is to add even those mobs that are not in Vanilla Minecraft to your world of babies, such as baby creeper, baby skeleton, baby stray, baby enderman and many others... ### Details All of the changes and additions in this project are detailed below.
Characteristics Almost everything is like in vanilla Minecraft, for example with zombies and baby zombies The chance of a baby mob appearing instead of an adult is **5%** The movement speed of each baby mob is **30%** faster than its adult version The size of baby mobs is approximately **50%** of the size of an adult, however for some this number can be changed by **10-20%** The baby creeper explodes in **21 ticks** within a radius of **2** blocks The baby ghast projectile has an explosion force of **0.3** The remaining characteristics are the same as for adult mobs Coming soon: Baby mobs have bigger heads
Mobs All Mobs: ### Creeper ![Creeper](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/vhO6iWCb/images/afd88fd2cbe759f4d479c856e9af88965bc14eb1.png 'Baby Creeper and Creeper') ### Skeleton ![Skeleton](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/vhO6iWCb/images/a2c16926b95acafba05649a43912ef110c890910.png 'Baby Skeleton and Skeleton') ### Stray ![Stray](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/vhO6iWCb/images/e0f00078608b76288702325503e03fd3f99acdd4.png 'Baby Stray and Stray') ### Enderman ![Enderman](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/vhO6iWCb/images/5ceedb9a5a0c73d7bba4100c8c0186e12efee40a.png 'Baby Enderman and Enderman') ### Spider ![Spider](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/vhO6iWCb/images/a98589526b2eca1cf5fd13def7143fb435b98c03.png 'Baby Spider and Spider') ### Cave Spider ![Cave Spider](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/vhO6iWCb/images/7739fb040ccf1eb59ac7371b694b8f220bdf31e7.png 'Baby Cave Spider and Cave Spider') ### Wither Skeleton ![Wither Skeleton](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/vhO6iWCb/images/ff569b8bcd5242668226206b3ca3885e32ca4f98.png 'Baby Wither Skeleton and Wither Skeleton') ### Blaze ![Blaze](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/vhO6iWCb/images/954bf41f95464a85719319999d31797798b4d177.png 'Baby Blaze and Blaze') ### Ghast ![Ghast](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/vhO6iWCb/images/67e3ce1b2fa3dd5366dca75b47c8ae67cef7db88.png 'Baby Ghast and Ghast') ### Witch ![Witch](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/vhO6iWCb/images/9a9b0e3cdbb4f8e098319eb76c14228c96ec2ebb.png 'Baby Witch and Witch') ### Ravager ![Ravager](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/vhO6iWCb/images/57b2b5bd5a55436a464c774915265c9196b2c33f.png 'Baby Ravager and Ravager') ### Pillager ![Pillager](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/vhO6iWCb/images/13bd7479084287c10e25a76058b46c3605549b60.png 'Baby Pillager and Pillager') ### Vindicator ![Vindicator](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/vhO6iWCb/images/cfba2f30436494f981116055ce533c6a497e51b3.png 'Baby Vindicator and Vindicator') ### Evoker ![Evoker](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/vhO6iWCb/images/8a06342ee13f18c447929d472925a27f902b082d.png 'Baby Evoker and Evoker') ### Phantom ![Phantom](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/vhO6iWCb/images/d6fd85b21a41423f66a2d44c3691f14fa9bf3492.png 'Baby Phantom and Phantom') ### Breeze ![Breeze](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/vhO6iWCb/images/918d3dd860d3352c4cee8721ddb911d55cf37d4a.png 'Baby Breeze and Breeze')
Support To support me, you don't have to have money. I will be very happy if you just watch any video on my [YouTube](https://www.youtube.com/ResPack) channel😊 You can also like the post on [Planet Minecraft](https://www.planetminecraft.com/member/respack/submissions/) ### For special people: - [Boosty](https://boosty.to/respack_) - [Donation Alerts](https://www.donationalerts.com/r/respack)
